description: You are logged into iDempiere ERP as GardenAdmin for the GardenWorld company. The operations manager needs to create a formal material requisition to request the purchasing department to reorder nursery stock for the summer season. Create a requisition with the following header details: Organization 'HQ', Warehouse 'HQ Warehouse', Price List 'Purchase', Document Date '07/15/2024', Date Required '08/01/2024', and Description 'Seasonal stock replenishment - Summer 2024'. Include two requisition lines: 50 units of 'Azalea Bush' and 25 units of 'Elm Tree'. Complete the document so it reaches 'Completed' status.
